name: Cowboy
description:
__Height:__ 155cm
__Affiliations:__ Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops

The spotted-billed duck with the cowboy hat and glasses. He always seems to be relaxed, no matter the situation. 
[Sanji](https://anilist.co/character/305/Sanji) rode on him on the way back to the Going Merry.

(Source: One Piece Wiki)
